## Checklist

- [ ] `composer test` passes (`vendor/bin/pest`)
- [ ] `composer lint` passes (`pint --test`)
- [ ] `composer analyse` passes (PHPStan)
- [ ] Guard tests updated if this PR changes CSS signature selectors (e.g. always-dark sidebar)
- [ ] Both `README.md` and `README.pt-BR.md` updated if documentation/behavior changed
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for development setup and script details.
